items.title: Cognitive Fluctuations, Neuropsychiatric Burden, and Quality of Life in Moderate-Advanced Dementia With Lewy Bodies: The Role of Dysautonomia.
items.abstract: Cognitive fluctuations are reported in 90% of individuals with dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB) and along with dysautonomia, are a key source of disability. Through this effort, we sought to investigate the relationship between autonomic burden and cognitive fluctuations, neuropsychiatric burden and quality of life in moderate-advanced DLB. This multicenter, prospective, observational, longitudinal cohort study, Predicting ACcurately End-of-Life in Dementia With Lewy Bodies and Promoting Quality End-of-Life Experiences (PACE-DLB), was conducted in the United States to study individuals with moderate-advanced DLB. The primary exposure for the current analysis was time-varying total autonomic burden, as measured by the autonomic symptom checklist (ASC) at baseline and follow-up visits. The primary outcomes were cognitive fluctuations measured by Clinician Assessment of Fluctuations (CAF) scores and neuropsychiatric burden as measured by Neuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire (NPI-Q) scores. Secondary outcomes included quality of life (QoL) captured through the Quality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease scale. Mixed-effects regression analyses were conducted to assess the effect of autonomic burden on each primary outcome, with age, sex, education, Charlson Comorbidity Index, anticholinergic burden, levodopa equivalent daily dosage, and EPWORTH sleepiness scale scores adjusted as potential confounders. We additionally conducted modified graphical network model analyses. A total of 189 patients with 745 longitudinal observations were included in the analysis. Mean age of the cohort was 74.92 years (SD 7.77 years) with 22% female participants. At baseline, ASC was directly associated with CAF (RC = 0.16; 95% CI 0.01-0.31;  Autonomic burden correlates with severity of cognitive fluctuations and neuropsychiatric burden in moderate-advanced DLB. It also correlates with the QoL of the caregiver over time. These results encourage investigation into novel potential therapeutic avenues in moderate-advanced DLB.
items.summary_ja:
背景：レビー小体型認知症（DLB）では認知の変動が90％に見られ、自律神経障害（ディスオートノミア）とともに障害の主要因となっている。本研究は、中等度から進行期のDLB患者における自律神経負荷と認知変動、神経精神症状負荷、生活の質（QoL）との関連を調査した。

方法：米国の多施設共同前向き観察コホート研究PACE-DLBにて、189名の中等度から進行期DLB患者を対象に、基線および追跡時の自律神経症状チェックリスト（ASC）による自律神経負荷を測定。認知変動はClinician Assessment of Fluctuations（CAF）、神経精神症状負荷はNeuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire（NPI-Q）、QoLはQuality of Life-Alzheimer’s Disease尺度で評価。混合効果回帰分析により年齢、性別、教育歴などを調整して関連を検討した。

結果：745件の縦断的観察で、自律神経負荷は認知変動（CAFスコア）および神経精神症状負荷（NPI-Qスコア）と有意に正の相関を示した。また、介護者のQoLとも関連が認められた。

結論：中等度から進行期DLBにおいて、自律神経負荷は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と関連し、介護者の生活の質にも影響を及ぼす。これらの知見は新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: レビー小体型認知症（DLB）の中等度から進行期患者189名を対象に、自律神経障害の負担が認知機能の変動や神経精神症状の重症度、生活の質（QoL）に与える影響を縦断的に検討した。自律神経負担は認知変動や神経精神症状の悪化と有意に関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。これらの知見はDLBの新たな治療戦略の開発に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: Acute Environmental Triggers and Intermediate-Term Modulators of Emergency Migraine-Related Health Care Encounters.
items.abstract: Migraine activity is shaped not only by the biological vulnerability but also by environmental factors that may influence susceptibility and contribute to fluctuations in migraine occurrence, although the evidence remains inconsistent. We aimed to evaluate the intermediate-term and short-term effects of environmental exposures on migraine activity and to examine a conceptual layered model comprising biological vulnerability, intermediate-term environmental modulators, and acute triggers. We conducted a population-based case-crossover study among patients with migraine identified from the Negev Migraine Cohort (2000-2023), using electronic medical records from Clalit Health Services and Soroka University Medical Center. Eligible participants were adult patients (≥18 years) residing in Be'er Sheva, Israel, with migraine diagnoses or triptan prescriptions. Daily exposure to air pollutants and meteorologic conditions were obtained from fixed monitoring stations. Outcomes were emergency migraine-related encounters as a marker of triggered events and quarterly triptan use as a marker for disease activity. Intermediate-term modulators were defined as weekly climatic conditions hypothesized to modify the short-term effects of daily exposures. Associations were evaluated using conditional logistic and Poisson regression. The analysis included 7,032 adult patients with migraine residing in Be'er Sheva. Short-term exposure to nitrogen dioxide (NO Short-term and cumulative exposure to ambient air pollution and climatic factors were associated with increased migraine activity. Although these findings support a layered model of environmental modulation of migraine activity, their generalizability is limited by the use of emergency health care encounters as a proxy outcome, underscoring the need for further research using complementary measures.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の発症は生物学的脆弱性だけでなく、環境要因によっても影響を受けるが、その証拠は一貫していない。本研究は、環境曝露の中期および短期的影響を評価し、生物学的脆弱性、中期的環境調整因子、急性誘発因子からなる多層モデルを検証することを目的とした。  
方法：イスラエルのベールシェバ在住の成人片頭痛患者7,032名を対象に、2000～2023年の電子医療記録を用いたケースクロスオーバー研究を実施。大気汚染物質（特に二酸化窒素）や気象条件のデータを固定観測局から取得し、緊急片頭痛関連受診を急性誘発イベントの指標、四半期ごとのトリプタン使用量を疾患活動性の指標とした。中期的調整因子は週単位の気候条件で定義。条件付きロジスティック回帰およびポアソン回帰で関連を解析。  
結果：短期的および累積的な大気汚染曝露と気象因子は片頭痛活動性の増加と有意に関連した。特に二酸化窒素の曝露が急性発作の誘発に寄与することが示唆された。  
結論：環境要因は片頭痛活動性に多層的に影響を与えることが支持されたが、緊急受診を代理指標としたため一般化には限界があり、補完的指標を用いたさらなる研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、イスラエル・ベールシェバ在住の7,032人の片頭痛患者を対象に、大気汚染や気象条件が片頭痛活動に与える短期および中期の影響を調査した。特に二酸化窒素などの大気汚染物質への曝露が、緊急医療受診やトリプタン使用増加と関連し、片頭痛発症の環境的トリガーおよび調整因子の多層モデルを支持した。ただし、緊急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、さらなる研究が必要である。

items.title: Cognitive and Brain Reserve as Modifiers of Early Alzheimer Disease-Related Cognitive Vulnerability.
items.abstract: Maintaining cognitive function despite the presence of Alzheimer disease (AD) pathology is the foundation of cognitive reserve. Although the theory of cognitive reserve is strongly supported by empirical research, the field lacks standardized, validated methods for quantifying cognitive and brain reserve. We tested whether associations between AD pathology and cognitive function were modified by proxy measures of cognitive reserve (years of education, socioeconomic status; SES) and brain reserve (brain-predicted age difference, and a volumetric AD signature). We hypothesized that greater structural brain integrity, higher education, and higher SES would attenuate the association between greater AD pathology and poorer cognitive performance. This cross-sectional study analyzed baseline data from a multisite randomized clinical trial, which was conducted at 3 US universities and enrolled cognitively unimpaired, physically inactive, community-dwelling adults. AD pathology was measured via plasma assays for phosphorylated tau (p-tau)-217 in the whole cohort, and PET for β-amyloid (Aβ) in a subset of participants as a secondary analysis. The primary outcome of cognitive function was evaluated by a comprehensive cognitive assessment. SES was measured via the MacArthur Socioeconomic Status Index, and magnetic resonance imaging was used to calculate brain-predicted age difference (brain-PAD) and a volumetric AD signature. Data were analyzed using linear regression models with interaction terms for moderation analyses. A total of 621 participants (aged 69.9 ± 3.8, 71% female) had available data for the main analyses and 355 had PET Centiloid data available. Brain-PAD moderated the association between AD pathology (measured by p-tau217) and multiple cognitive domains, including episodic memory (β = -0.09 [-0.16 to -0.02]), processing speed (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]), working memory (β = -0.10 [-0.18 to -0.03]), and executive function/attentional control (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]). Specifically, the negative association of greater AD pathology with poorer cognition was weakest in individuals with younger appearing brains. A latent SES score also moderated the relationship between p-tau217 and episodic memory (β = 0.08 [0.01-0.16]), but this did not survive correction for multiple comparisons. Neither years of education nor the volumetric AD signature moderated pathology-cognition associations. These results support the hypothesis that higher cognitive and brain reserve may help buffer the cognitive consequences of AD pathology. Strategies to increase both cognitive and brain reserve could help to boost resilience against emerging AD pathology; however, longitudinal studies are needed to confirm these conclusions.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）病理があっても認知機能を維持する認知予備力の理論は支持されているが、認知予備力や脳予備力を定量化する標準的手法は不足している。  
方法：認知予備力の代理指標（教育年数、社会経済的地位：SES）と脳予備力（脳予測年齢差、AD特異的体積指標）がAD病理と認知機能の関連を修飾するかを検証した。対象は認知障害のない高齢者621名で、血漿中のリン酸化タウ217（p-tau217）や一部でPETによるβアミロイド測定を行い、包括的認知評価を実施。線形回帰モデルで相互作用を分析した。  
結果：脳予測年齢差（brain-PAD）はp-tau217と複数の認知領域（エピソード記憶、処理速度、作業記憶、実行機能）間の負の関連を緩和し、若い脳を持つ人ほどAD病理の認知影響が小さかった。SESもエピソード記憶に対する修飾効果を示したが、多重比較補正後は有意でなかった。教育年数や体積的AD指標は修飾効果を示さなかった。  
結論：高い認知予備力および脳予備力はAD病理による認知機能低下を緩和する可能性があり、これらを高める戦略はADに対する認知的レジリエンス向上に有望である。ただし、因果関係解明には縦断研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）病理と認知機能の関連に対し、認知予備力（教育年数、社会経済的地位）および脳予備力（脳の予測年齢差、体積的AD指標）が修飾因子となるかを検証した。結果、脳の若々しさを示す指標がAD病理と認知低下の関連を緩和し、社会経済的地位も一部で影響を示したが、教育年数や体積的指標は影響しなかった。これらは認知・脳予備力がAD病理の認知影響を緩和する可能性を示唆し、予備力向上がAD耐性強化に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: A Nationwide Study of Pyruvate Dehydrogenase Complex Deficiency in Sweden: Epidemiology, Genotype-Phenotype Correlations, and Survival.
items.abstract: Pyruvate dehydrogenase complex (PDHc) deficiency is a potentially treatable neurodegenerative genetic disorder. It represents a common cause of mitochondrial disease. Most published reports are limited to single cases, and population-based data are lacking. The objective of this study was to investigate the prevalence, incidence, and life expectancy and to explore genotype-phenotype correlations, clinical onset, and disease course. We conducted a nationwide, population-based epidemiologic cohort study with retrospective, longitudinal, and cross-sectional components. The cohort included all individuals residing in Sweden who were diagnosed between 2003 and 2022. A total of 54 patients (35 female patients) were identified, corresponding to a birth prevalence of 2.43 per 100,000 live births (95% CI 1.86-3.17) and a point prevalence of 0.44 per 100,000 population (95% CI 0.40-0.65). Eight patients (15%) died during the study period. The primary causes of death were congenital lactic acidosis (n = 4), stroke (n = 2), and infection (n = 2). We identified 35 pathogenic variants, including 11 not previously reported. X-linked  This nationwide, population-based study reports on the occurrence and survival of PDHc deficiency. We demonstrate genotype-sex-phenotype differences in
items.summary_ja:
背景：ピルビン酸デヒドロゲナーゼ複合体（PDHc）欠損症は、治療可能な神経変性遺伝疾患であり、ミトコンドリア病の主要な原因の一つであるが、これまでの報告は単一症例が多く、全国規模の疫学データは不足していた。  
方法：スウェーデン国内に居住し、2003年から2022年にPDHc欠損症と診断された全患者を対象に、後ろ向きかつ縦断的、横断的な全国人口ベースの疫学コホート研究を実施した。  
結果：54名（女性35名）が特定され、出生時有病率は10万人あたり2.43（95%CI 1.86-3.17）、ポイント有病率は10万人あたり0.44（95%CI 0.40-0.65）であった。研究期間中に8名（15%）が死亡し、主な死因は先天性乳酸アシドーシス（4例）、脳卒中（2例）、感染症（2例）であった。35種類の病原性変異を同定し、そのうち11変異は新規報告であった。  
結論：本研究はPDHc欠損症の全国規模の発生率と生存率を明らかにし、遺伝子型・性別・表現型の相違を示した。
items.summary_short_ja: スウェーデンにおけるピルビン酸デヒドロゲナーゼ複合体（PDHc）欠損症の全国調査で、出生頻度は10万出生あたり2.43例、有病率は10万人あたり0.44例と報告された。54例中8例が死亡し、主な死因は先天性乳酸アシドーシス、脳卒中、感染症であった。35の病的変異が同定され、そのうち11は新規で、遺伝子型・性別・表現型の関連性も示された。

items.title: Outcomes After Minor Ischemic Stroke in Older Patients Treated With IV Thrombolysis vs Standard of Care in the TEMPO-2 Trial.
items.abstract: There are few high-quality data on thrombolysis outcomes in the oldest patients, especially for minor stroke. We examined safety and efficacy outcomes of thrombolysis in patients older than 80 years, compared with those ≤80 years, in the Tenecteplase Versus Standard of care for Minor Ischaemic Stroke With Proven Occlusion (TEMPO-2) trial. In this post hoc analysis of the TEMPO-2 randomized controlled trial, we compared outcomes and adverse events in patients with minor stroke and symptomatic intracranial occlusion or focal perfusion lesion within 12 hours of symptom onset, assigned to tenecteplase vs nonthrombolytic standard of care, in those >80 years and ≤80 years. The primary outcome was responder analysis of the 90-day modified Rankin Scale (responder was mRS = 0-1 if premorbid mRS = 0-1, 0-2 if premorbid mRS = 2). Secondary outcomes included neurologic recovery according to the NIH Stroke Scale (NIHSS) at 5 days/discharge, vessel recanalization, Lawton Instrumental Activities of Daily Living Scale, EuroQol-5 Dimension (EQ-5D), and adverse events. We used mixed-effects Poisson, ordinal logistic, and quantile regression as appropriate, adjusted for sex, baseline NIHSS, and treatment assignment as fixed-effects and enrolling site as random effects. Among 884 patients in the intention-to-treat analysis (208 [23.5%] >80 years, 365 [41.6%] female). Significant interactions between age and treatment were observed for mRS responder, mRS 0-1, return to baseline function, EQ-5D index, and vessel recanalization. Patients >80 years generally fared worse with tenecteplase for mRS outcomes (mRS 0-1 in 49 [46.2%] vs 61 [59.8%] with control, adjusted risk ratio [aRR] 0.83, 95% CI 0.72-0.97), while among patients ≤80 years, there was no significant difference (249 [76.4%] vs 260 [74.7%], aRR 1.01, 95% CI 0.98-1.03). However, in both age groups, patients were more likely to achieve recanalization of visible occlusions (aRR ≤80 years 2.06, 95% CI 1.60-2.65, >80 years 2.77, 95% CI 2.21-3.47) and NIHSS = 0 at 5 days/discharge when assigned to tenecteplase (aRR ≤80 years 1.14, 95% CI 1.04-1.26, >80 years 1.21, 95% CI 1.10-1.33). Serious adverse events (SAEs) were more frequent with tenecteplase among patients >80 years (risk ratio 2.29, 95% CI 1.27-4.13), particularly hemorrhages and stroke progression/recurrence (any extra/intracranial hemorrhage in 5 [4.7%] vs 0 with standard of care,  Older patients (>80 years) with minor stroke and visible occlusion or perfusion lesion assigned to tenecteplase were more likely to achieve recanalization of occlusions and short-term neurologic recovery, as were younger patients, but they experienced worse 90-day outcomes with more frequent hemorrhagic and stroke progression/recurrence-related SAEs. Overall, these results, while post hoc, do not support thrombolysis for minor strokes in older patients. ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT02398656. This study provides Class III evidence that in patients >80 years with minor stroke and visible occlusion or perfusion lesion, IV thrombolysis with tenecteplase is associated with worse functional outcomes at 90 days compared with nonthrombolytic standard of care therapies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：高齢者の軽度虚血性脳卒中に対する血栓溶解療法の安全性・有効性に関する高品質データは少ない。  
方法：TEMPO-2試験の事後解析として、80歳超と80歳以下の軽度脳卒中患者を対象に、テネクテプラーゼ（血栓溶解薬）投与群と非血栓溶解標準治療群で90日後の機能的回復（修正Rankinスケール：mRS）や神経学的回復、血管再開通率、副作用を比較した。  
結果：884例中、208例が80歳超。80歳超群ではテネクテプラーゼ投与により血管再開通率と短期神経回復は改善したが、90日後の機能的回復は標準治療群より劣り（mRS 0-1：46.2% vs 59.8%、調整リスク比0.83）、重篤な有害事象（特に出血や脳卒中悪化）が増加した。一方、80歳以下群では機能的回復に有意差はなかったが、再開通率と神経回復は改善した。  
結論：80歳超の軽度脳卒中患者に対するテネクテプラーゼによる血栓溶解療法は、短期的な血管再開通や神経回復は促進するものの、90日後の機能的予後は悪化し、有害事象も増加するため推奨されない。
items.summary_short_ja: TEMPO-2試験の後解析で、80歳超の軽度虚血性脳卒中患者におけるテネクテプラーゼ静注療法と標準治療の比較を行った。80歳超群は血管再開通や短期神経回復は認められたが、90日後の機能回復は劣り、出血や脳卒中再発など重篤な有害事象が多発した。一方、80歳以下群では機能回復に差はなかった。高齢軽度脳卒中への血栓溶解療法は推奨されない。

items.title: Impact of Basal Ganglia Perivascular Spaces on Ischemic and Hemorrhagic Risks in Patients Taking Antithrombotic Therapies.
items.abstract: Enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVSs) are considered to increase the risk of stroke. However, data regarding the benefits and risks of antithrombotic therapy in patients with ePVSs are currently limited. This study assessed the association between ePVSs and the risks of hemorrhagic or ischemic events in patients taking antithrombotic agents. This prospective, multicenter observational study enrolled patients with cerebrovascular or cardiovascular diseases who had newly started or were continuing to take oral antithrombotic agents at 52 hospitals across Japan between 2016 and 2019. Baseline multimodal MRI was performed for all of the study participants. The images were then centrally evaluated for cerebral small vessel disease (SVD), including white matter hyperintensities, cerebral microbleeds, lacunes, and basal ganglia-enlarged perivascular spaces (BGPVSs). BGPVSs were categorized as 0, 1-10, 11-20, or ≥21. Outcomes included major bleeding, intracranial hemorrhage, ischemic events, ischemic stroke, and mortality. Multivariable Cox proportional hazards models were used for the BGPVSs (in categorical and ordinal forms), adjusted for patient demographics, vascular risk factors, and other SVD markers. Of the total 5,065 patients (1,663 women; median age 74 [interquartile range 67-81] years), antiplatelets and anticoagulants were administered at the baseline to 3,820 (75.4%) and 1,502 (29.7%) patients, respectively. Their BGPVS distributions were as follows: 0, 475 (9.4%); 1-10, 2,615 (51.6%); 11-20, 1,267 (25.0%); and 21+, 708 patients (14.0%). Over a median follow-up period of 2.0 (interquartile range 1.8-2.0) years, we noted 266 ischemic events, 188 ischemic strokes, 92 major bleeding events, 54 intracranial hemorrhages, and 198 deaths. Higher BGPVS was associated with an increased risk of major bleeding (BGPVS ≥21: adjusted hazard ratio [aHR] 4.04, 95% CI 1.17-13.92; per-unit increase: aHR 1.38, 95% CI 1.07-1.77) and ischemic stroke (BGPVS ≥21: aHR 2.58, 95% CI 1.21-5.50; per-unit increase: aHR 1.28, 95% CI 1.07-1.53) but was not significantly associated with higher risks of ischemic events, intracranial hemorrhage, or mortality. Higher BGPVS burdens are associated with higher risks of ischemic stroke and major bleeding in patients receiving antithrombotic therapy. BGPVSs may serve as useful imaging biomarkers for vascular risk assessment and personalized therapy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：拡大した基底核周囲血管腔（BGPVSs）は脳卒中リスク増加とされるが、抗血栓療法患者におけるその意義は不明である。  
方法：2016～2019年に日本の52病院で、抗血栓薬を新規または継続服用中の脳・心血管疾患患者5,065名を対象に前向き多施設観察研究を実施。ベースラインで多モーダルMRIを撮影し、白質病変や微小出血、ラクーン、BGPVSsを評価。BGPVSsは0、1-10、11-20、21以上に分類。主要評価項目は大出血、頭蓋内出血、虚血性イベント、虚血性脳卒中、死亡。多変量Cox回帰分析でリスクを検討。  
結果：中央値2年の追跡で、266件の虚血イベント、188件の虚血性脳卒中、92件の大出血、54件の頭蓋内出血、198件の死亡を確認。BGPVSsが21以上の群は大出血（調整ハザード比4.04）および虚血性脳卒中（同2.58）のリスクが有意に増加。虚血イベント全体や頭蓋内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。  
結論：抗血栓療法患者において、BGPVSsの負荷増加は虚血性脳卒中および大出血リスクの上昇と関連し、血管リスク評価や個別化治療のための有用な画像バイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、抗血栓療法を受ける患者における基底核周囲血管腔拡大（BGPVS）と虚血性・出血性リスクの関連を検討した。5,065例を対象に2年間追跡し、BGPVSの増加は虚血性脳卒中および主要出血リスクの上昇と有意に関連したが、全体の虚血イベントや頭蓋内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。BGPVSは血管リスク評価や個別化治療の有用な画像バイオマーカーとなり得る。

items.title: Iatrogenic Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy After Cardiac Surgery: Two Case Reports.
items.abstract: To alert on the risk of interhuman transmission of β-amyloid (Aβ) pathology leading to cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA) after non-neurosurgical procedures, here cardiovascular procedures, using cadaveric dura mater (DM) patches. We describe 2 patients with a similar medical history of cardiac surgery for transposition of the great vessels and presenting with symptomatic hematomas revealing imaging features of probable CAA according to Boston 2.0 but with early onset. Both patients lacked hereditary causes of CAA. PET amyloid imaging with  These 2 cases add to the growing evidence regarding Aβ transmissibility in humans and remove the confounding factor of neurosurgery. Iatrogenic CAA diagnosis should be considered after exclusion of genetic causes in patients with early-onset clinical and neuroimaging features of CAA. Patient should have evidence of Aβ accumulation in the CNS and a suggestive medical history. Treatments at risk should not be limited to neurosurgery and should namely include cardiovascular procedures with CNS tissues such as cadaveric DM or exposure to cadaveric human growth hormone.
items.summary_ja:
【背景】β-アミロイド（Aβ）病理の人為的伝播による脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）が、神経外科以外の手術後にも発生するリスクが指摘されている。特に心血管手術で使用される死体硬膜パッチが問題となる可能性がある。  
【方法】大血管転位症の心臓手術歴を持ち、早期発症のCAAを示す画像所見と症候性血腫を呈した2例を報告。遺伝性のCAA原因は否定され、PETアミロイドイメージングで中枢神経系のAβ蓄積を確認した。  
【結果】両例は神経外科手術を受けておらず、心血管手術に伴う死体硬膜パッチ使用がAβ伝播の原因と考えられた。これにより、Aβのヒト間伝播の証拠が増強された。  
【結論】早期発症のCAA患者では遺伝性を除外した上で、医原性CAAの可能性を考慮すべきである。リスクのある治療は神経外科に限らず、死体硬膜や死体由来成長ホルモンを用いる心血管手術も含まれるべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 心臓手術で使用された死体硬膜パッチにより、β-アミロイド（Aβ）が人から人へ伝播し、早期発症の脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）を引き起こした2例を報告。遺伝性原因は否定され、PETアミロイドイメージングでAβ蓄積を確認。神経外科以外の心血管手術でも医原性CAAのリスクがあることを示し、早期発症CAA患者では遺伝子検査と病歴確認が重要と結論づけた。

items.title: Systolic Blood Pressure Trajectory and Outcomes in Acute Intracerebral Hemorrhage: Pooled Analysis of the 4 INTERACT and ATACH-II Clinical Trials.
items.abstract: While moderate and rapid systolic blood pressure (SBP) lowering was associated with better functional outcomes after intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH), large reductions in SBP within 1 hour, for example, reductions from >200 to <140 mm Hg, diminished or even reversed these beneficial effects. We aimed to define the optimal trajectory of SBP control in relation to favorable functional outcomes after acute ICH. We conducted a pooled analysis of individual patient-level data from all 4 Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage Trial (INTERACT) and second Antihypertensive Treatment of Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage (ATACH-II) trials, which were international, randomized, open-label, blinded, end point-assessed, controlled trials that determined the effectiveness of early intensive SBP control in acute ICH. Latent class analysis grouped SBP trajectories over the first 24 hours (9 measurements) into defined clusters. The primary outcome was functional recovery at 90 days after randomization, defined as modified Rankin Scale (mRS) scores of 3-6. Logistic regression models with adjustment for baseline covariates and trial were used to determine associations between SBP cluster trajectories and outcomes in INTERACT, with validation in ATACH-II. A total of 11,269 patients (INTERACT n = 10,269; ATACH-II n = 1,000; mean age 62.4 years; female 36.4%) with at least 1 postrandomization SBP reading were included. Six SBP trajectories were identified: low, moderate-to-low, moderate, high, high-to-moderate, and high-to-low. Compared with the low SBP group, associations with poor functional outcome (mRS scores 3-6) increased progressively across other groups in INTERACT ( Distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours defined prognosis after ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of death or disability, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. These findings highlight the importance of well-controlled but tailored SBP management strategies after ICH. This study provides Class III evidence that distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours are associated with prognosis after acute ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of poor functional outcome, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. (INTERACT1 NCT00226096; INTERACT2 NCT00716079; INTERACT3 NCT03209258; INTERACT4 NCT03790800; ATACH-2 NCT01176565).
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性脳内出血（ICH）後の収縮期血圧（SBP）管理は機能的予後に影響を与えるが、過度な急激な血圧低下は逆効果となる可能性がある。最適なSBP制御の軌跡を明らかにすることを目的とした。  
方法：4つの国際的ランダム化比較試験（INTERACT1-4およびATACH-II）から個別患者データを統合解析し、発症後24時間のSBP変動パターンを潜在クラス分析で6群に分類。90日後の機能的回復（修正Rankinスケール3-6）との関連を多変量ロジスティック回帰で検討し、INTERACTで解析後、ATACH-IIで検証した。  
結果：11,269例（平均年齢62.4歳、女性36.4%）を解析。SBP軌跡は「低値」「中等度から低値」「中等度」「高値」「高値から中等度」「高値から低値」の6群に分類された。低SBP群と比較し、高SBP群ほど機能障害リスクが増加し、特に重度高血圧群は死亡または障害のオッズが最も高かった。  
結論：ICH後24時間のSBP軌跡は予後を左右し、過度な高血圧は不良転帰のリスクを高める。血圧管理は個別化しつつ適切にコントロールすることが重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性脳内出血（ICH）患者11,269例のデータを4つの国際臨床試験から統合解析し、24時間の収縮期血圧（SBP）変動パターンを6群に分類した。低SBP群と比較し、高SBP群は機能的回復不良（mRS 3-6）のリスクが有意に高く、急激な大幅降圧は利益を減少させた。適切かつ個別化されたSBP管理がICH後の予後改善に重要であることを示した。

items.title: Association of an Aquaporin-4 Haplotype With Cognition, Brain Volume, and Dementia Risk in Community-Dwelling Individuals Without Dementia.
items.abstract: The aquaporin-4 (AQP4) water channel plays an integral role in clearing brain waste. However, little is known about whether variations in the  This study included participants from 2 prospective cohort studies. First, participants from the original, offspring, new offspring spouse, and generation 3 cohorts from the Framingham Heart Study (FHS; enrolled 1948-2005) were included with dementia follow-up until 2022. Original FHS participants were from Framingham, Massachusetts at the time of enrollment. Analyses were replicated for brain MRI outcomes and incident dementia with UK Biobank participants (enrolled 2006-2010) who were followed until 2022. All participants were dementia-free at the time of cognitive assessment, brain MRI, and commencement of dementia follow-up. Linear regression models were conducted to analyze the associations between  The FHS sample comprised 3,847 participants (65% homozygote major, 31% heterozygote, 4% homozygote minor) with cognitive testing (mean age 61 ± 11 years; 54% women); 3,332 had brain MRI. Heterozygotes displayed better verbal episodic memory (β = 0.32, 95% CI 0.09-0.55,  Carrying at least 1 minor allele at an
items.summary_ja:
背景：アクアポリン-4（AQP4）は脳内の老廃物除去に重要な水チャネルであるが、その遺伝的多型が認知機能や脳容積、認知症リスクに与える影響は不明である。  
方法：フラミンガム心臓研究（FHS）とUKバイオバンクの認知症非罹患者を対象に、AQP4ハプロタイプと認知機能、脳MRI所見、認知症発症リスクの関連を検討した。FHSでは3,847名（平均年齢61歳、54%女性）、うち3,332名が脳MRIを実施。線形回帰モデルを用いて解析を行い、UKバイオバンクで結果の再現性を確認した。  
結果：FHSではヘテロ接合型が言語性エピソード記憶で優れた成績を示し（β=0.32、95%CI 0.09-0.55）、脳容積も有意に大きかった。UKバイオバンクでも同様の傾向が認められた。さらに、少なくとも1つのマイナーアレルを保有する群で認知症発症リスクが低減した。  
結論：AQP4の特定ハプロタイプは認知機能の維持や脳容積の保持、認知症リスクの低減に関連しており、脳の老廃物除去機構が認知症予防に寄与する可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アクアポリン-4（AQP4）遺伝子ハプロタイプと認知機能、脳容積、認知症リスクの関連を、認知症未発症の地域在住者を対象に検討した。フラミンガム心臓研究およびUKバイオバンクのデータを用い、AQP4の遺伝的多型が言語性エピソード記憶の向上や脳容積の維持と関連し、認知症発症リスクの低減に寄与する可能性を示した。

items.title: Resting-State EEG Microstates as Dynamic Biomarkers of Network Dysfunction and Cognitive Impairment in Patients With Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) is characterized by large-scale brain network dysfunctions. EEG microstate analysis may track these dynamics. We investigated whether microstates could distinguish patients with MS from healthy volunteers, and cognitively impaired from cognitively preserved (CP) patients. For this cross-sectional observational study, we recruited participants from the Policlinico Umberto I Multiple Sclerosis Center (Rome). We compared microstates of patients with relapsing-remitting MS (Expanded Disability Status Scale [EDSS] score <3, no relapses within 30 days) with those of age-matched and sex-matched healthy volunteers. We also compared cognitively impaired and preserved patients. Group comparisons were performed on microstate temporal parameters and topographies (topographic analysis of variance). Classification used stepwise linear discriminant analysis (LDA). We enrolled 88 patients with MS (60 women, mean age 42.75 years) and 46 healthy volunteers (23 women, mean age 33.7 years). Compared with healthy volunteers (n = 45, 23 women, mean age 33.7 years), patients with MS (n = 46, 25 women, mean age 34.6 years) showed greater explained variance ( EEG microstates reveal behaviorally relevant alterations in patients with MS, supporting their utility as sensitive markers of large-scale functional network reorganization associated with clinical disability.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）は大規模な脳ネットワーク機能障害を特徴とし、脳波（EEG）マイクロステート解析がその動的変化を捉える可能性がある。  
方法：ローマのPoliclinico Umberto I MSセンターで再発寛解型MS患者（EDSSスコア3未満、30日以内の再発なし）と年齢・性別を一致させた健常者を対象に、EEGマイクロステートの時間的パラメータとトポグラフィーを比較した。また、認知障害の有無による患者間比較も行い、段階的線形判別分析（LDA）で分類を試みた。  
結果：MS患者（n=88、平均年齢42.75歳）は健常者（n=46、平均年齢33.7歳）に比べ、マイクロステートの説明分散が大きく、認知障害のある患者と認知保持患者間でも有意差が認められた。  
結論：EEGマイクロステートはMS患者の行動関連変化を反映し、臨床的障害に伴う大規模機能ネットワークの再編成を敏感に示す動的バイオマーカーとして有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者の安静時EEGマイクロステートを解析し、健常者との脳ネットワーク機能の違いや認知障害の有無を検討した。MS患者は健常者に比べマイクロステートの時間的特徴や分布に有意差があり、認知障害の識別にも有用であった。これにより、EEGマイクロステートはMSに伴う大規模ネットワーク機能障害や認知機能低下の動的バイオマーカーとして有望であることが示された。
